S.FORM: Vic Chou Vic Chou u siwkay niza Vic Chou (1981.6.9) nalecuhan i Taywan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2008ŚĻī, . u sulit nu Amilika Vic Chou (Chinese: ŚĎ®śłĚśįĎ; pinyin: ZhŇću Y√ļm√≠n) is a Taiwanese actor, singer and commercial model. He is a member of the Taiwanese boy band F4, and has starred in Taiwanese dramas. It had a variation only in the middle character from his birth name, ŚĎ®Ťā≤śįĎ (pinyin: ZhŇću Y√Ļm√≠n) u kawlah niza

S.FORM: Vic Chou Vic Chou u siwkay niza Vic Chou (1981.6.9) nalecuhan i Taywan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2008ŚĻī, . u sulit nu Amilika Vic Chou (Chinese: ŚĎ®śłĚśįĎ; pinyin: ZhŇću Y√ļm√≠n) is a Taiwanese actor, singer and commercial model. He is a member of the Taiwanese boy band F4, and has starred in Taiwanese dramas. It had a variation only in the middle character from his birth name, ŚĎ®Ťā≤śįĎ (pinyin: ZhŇću Y√Ļm√≠n) u kawlah niza
